acceptance_checks.evidence: Create a filesystem worker produces IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED plus a handoff summary targeting SERVER_MANAGEMENT / FILESYSTEM.
Summary displays governance foundation, model, certification, runtime, and test artifact candidates.
Summary displays CLAUDE_CODE (WORKER_ROLE) as the required resource role.
Summary displays governance artifacts: 3, runtime artifacts: 1, tests: 2.
APPROVAL_NOT_REQUIRED_FOR_HANDOFF is rendered as NOT REQUIRED.
Visibility replay reconstruction verifies handoff lineage, artifact lineage, wrapper hashes, artifact hashes, and summary hash continuity.
Visibility runtime source does not create planned implementation artifacts, dispatch workers, invoke workers, authorize implementation, start execution, or mutate governance.

validation_commands.command: printf 'Create a filesystem worker.\nexit\n' | python -m aigol.cli.aigol_cli conversation --session-id SESSION-CLI-HANDOFF-VISIBILITY-000001 --created-at 2026-06-04T00:00:00+00:00 --runtime-root /tmp/aigol_implementation_handoff_visibility_cli_acceptance
validation_commands.summary: CLI returned IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED plus Handoff Summary.
